tools.name: intent_silent_scan
tools.description: Assess missing facts, constraints, and confidence before asking the user anything.
tools.regular_use: Used by Intent at Step 0 to decide whether the task can proceed.

tools.name: clarification_question
tools.description: Ask exactly one highest-impact clarification question.
tools.regular_use: Used by Intent at Step 1 until confidence reaches at least 95%.

tools.name: echo_check
tools.description: Produce the one-sentence work-order confirmation before locking intent.
tools.regular_use: Used by Intent at Step 2 after clarification confidence is high enough.

tools.name: intent_lock
tools.description: Lock the agreed work order after YES-GO and allow downstream agents to build.
tools.regular_use: Used only after user agreement.

tools.name: intent_reset
tools.description: Clear the intent state and restart at silent scan.
tools.regular_use: Used when the user says RESET or the task goal changes materially.

tools.name: task_reader
tools.description: Read the task title, description, status, assignee, acceptance criteria, and work log.
tools.regular_use: Used before an agent changes task state or writes a work-log entry.

tools.name: acceptance_criteria_editor
tools.description: Create or update acceptance criteria for a task.
tools.regular_use: Used by Intent to turn an ambiguous request into checkable work.

tools.name: assumption_log
tools.description: Record assumptions, open questions, and goal risks.
tools.regular_use: Used when the task can proceed but still carries ambiguity.

tools.name: resource_budgeter
tools.description: Estimate and record how much of the available budget the task should consume.
tools.regular_use: Used by Optimiser to keep default effort near the 60% resource target.

tools.name: capacity_checker
tools.description: Compare task estimates against sprint or cycle capacity.
tools.regular_use: Used before pulling more work into active execution.

tools.name: risk_register
tools.description: Record risks that could cause overspend, rework, or goal drift.
tools.regular_use: Used when resource pressure or uncertainty changes the plan.

tools.name: minimal_path_planner
tools.description: Choose the fewest components and steps needed to satisfy the goal.
tools.regular_use: Used by Simples before implementation starts.

tools.name: implementation_log
tools.description: Record implementation progress and the concrete result produced.
tools.regular_use: Used by Simples while moving work toward review.

tools.name: waste_scanner
tools.description: Inspect work for dead code, duplicate structure, and unnecessary components.
tools.regular_use: Used by Efficiency during review.

tools.name: design_replay
tools.description: Re-evaluate the design as if it were built from scratch with the current patches already known.
tools.regular_use: Used by Efficiency to identify better final shapes after incremental changes.

tools.name: verification_log
tools.description: Record checks performed and whether the task meets the acceptance criteria.
tools.regular_use: Used before completing or blocking a task.

tools.name: status_reporter
tools.description: Summarize status, owner, next action, blockers, and completion signal.
tools.regular_use: Used by Orchestrator to report back to the main task.

tools.name: handoff_tracker
tools.description: Record the next owner and handoff reason.
tools.regular_use: Used whenever task ownership changes between agents.

tools.name: fs_read
tools.description: Read a single UTF-8 text file from the local filesystem.
tools.regular_use: Real read-only adapter; requires human approval per path before the read runs.

tools.name: repo.read_file
tools.description: Read a text file inside an approved repo root.
tools.regular_use: Builder reads source before changing it.

tools.name: repo.search
tools.description: Substring-search text files inside an approved repo root.
tools.regular_use: Builder locates code to change.

tools.name: repo.write_file
tools.description: Write a text file inside an approved repo root.
tools.regular_use: Builder creates or edits code. Builder-only write capability.

tools.name: repo.run_tests
tools.description: Run pytest inside an approved repo root and report pass/fail.
tools.regular_use: Builder verifies a change before it can reach done.

tools.name: git.create_branch
tools.description: Create and check out a git branch in an approved repo root.
tools.regular_use: Builder checkpoints before changing files (engineered reversibility).

tools.name: git.commit
tools.description: Stage all changes and commit in an approved repo root.
tools.regular_use: Builder records a reversible checkpoint. Push remains separate and gated.

tools.name: git.status
tools.description: Show the porcelain working-tree status of an approved repo root.
tools.regular_use: Builder inspects pending changes.
